    Description
    ContextStatementBlockInstantiation
    this class is created if the scheme given by a context term has matched to a java program.
    SVInstantiations
    This class wraps a ImmMap<SchemaVariable,InstantiationEntry<?>> and is used to store instantiations of schemavariables.

  • Classes in de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.inst used by de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.inst
    Class
    Description
    ContextInstantiationEntry
    This class is used to store the information about a matched context of a dl formula.
    GenericSortCondition
    Abstract superclass for conditions controlling the instantiations of generic sorts
    GenericSortInstantiations
    This class handles the instantiation of generic sorts (used for generic taclets), i.e.
    IllegalInstantiationException
    this exception is thrown if an invalid instantiation for a schema variable was given
    InstantiationEntry
    This is an abstract class that encapsulates an instantiation of a SchemaVariable.
    ProgramList
     
    ProgramSVEntry
    this class encapsulates a SchemaVariable and its corresponding instantiation if it is a JavaProgramElement.
    ProgramSVInstantiation
    this class wrapps a ImmMap<SchemaVariable,JavaProgramElement> and is used to store instantiations of schemavariables.
    SortException
    this exception is thrown from an "SVInstantiations"-Object if the sorts of a schema variable and its instantiation are not compatible (and not generic)
    SVInstantiations
    This class wraps a ImmMap<SchemaVariable,InstantiationEntry<?>> and is used to store instantiations of schemavariables.
    SVInstantiations.UpdateLabelPair
